name: Flavored Salt
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sea salt with the whole peppercorns.
2. Add the brown sugar and stir until well combined.
3. Incorporate the juniper berries into the mixture.
4. Fold in the crushed bay leaf.
5. Stir in the whole cloves.
6. Once all ingredients are thoroughly mixed, crush or pound the mixture to create flavored salt suitable for 25 pounds of any kind of meat.
7. Use this flavored salt as desired in brines or for dry salting.
